return(function(L,W,T,N,D,A,X,E,i,O,C,R,M,B,u,F,P,n,Z,c,t,j)j,M,i,u,c,t,Z,F,n,O,C,R,P,E,B=927477+-927477,function(L,o)local W=C(o)local T=function(T,N)return u(L,{T,N},o,W)end return T u=#D return W(X)end,function()j=(-761976+761977)+j t[j]=377773+-377772 return j end,{},function(L,o)local W=C(o)local T=function(T,N,D)return u(L,{T,N,D},o,W)end return T end,function(L,o)local W=C(o)local T=function(T,N,D,A,X,R,t)return u(L,{T;N,D;A;X,R,t},o,W)end return T end,function(L,o)local W=C(o)local T=function(T)return u(L,{T},o,W)end return T end,function(L)t[L]=t[L]-(974563-974562)if-724051-(-724051)==t[L]then t[L],R[L]=nil,nil end end,function(L)for o=-335989+335990,#L,1013223-1013222 do t[L[o]]=(942318-942317)+t[L[o]]end if T then local
